task_completion.description: Update the pipeline-operator-role ClusterRole to grant update and patch verbs on the datapipelines/status subresource.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI showing the 'pipeline-operator-role' ClusterRole details or edit screen. The rules table must show a rule targeting the 'datapipelines/status' resource with the 'update' and 'patch' verbs.

task_completion.description: Create a new ClusterRole for viewing datapipelines with get, list, and watch verbs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI showing a new ClusterRole (e.g., 'datapipeline-viewer') with a rule targeting the 'datapipelines' resource and granting 'get', 'list', and 'watch' verbs.

task_completion.description: Label the viewer ClusterRole to aggregate to the default view role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI showing the Labels & Annotations section of the viewer ClusterRole. It must contain the label 'rbac.authorization.k8s.io/aggregate-to-view' with the value 'true'.

task_completion.description: Create a new ClusterRole for editing datapipelines with create, update, patch, delete, and deletecollection verbs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI showing a new ClusterRole (e.g., 'datapipeline-editor') with a rule targeting the 'datapipelines' resource and granting 'create', 'update', 'patch', 'delete', and 'deletecollection' verbs.

task_completion.description: Label the editor ClusterRole to aggregate to the default edit role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI showing the Labels & Annotations section of the editor ClusterRole. It must contain the label 'rbac.authorization.k8s.io/aggregate-to-edit' with the value 'true'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the editor ClusterRole does not have permissions to modify the status subresource.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI showing the rules for the editor ClusterRole. The rules must target 'datapipelines' but MUST NOT include 'datapipelines/status' in the resources list.

integrity.description: The agent used the Rancher web GUI to configure RBAC rather than exclusively using a terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Rancher web interface in a browser, specifically the RBAC/ClusterRoles management screens.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Rancher application and cluster resources.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show actual Kubernetes resources being created/edited in Rancher, not just text files or YAML manifests in a local text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Rancher UI looks standard without the browser developer console open to modify DOM elements.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target CRD: 'datapipelines.etl.data.com'. Operator Namespace: 'data-system'. Operator ServiceAccount: 'pipeline-operator'.
